form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th over 390m at Shepparton beaten 3.5 lengths (22.47) behind Spring Laver in a Grade 5 on April 13. Should be right in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning into home straight.

form.formComment: Finished fifth (27.23) last start at Shepparton. Prior to that had recorded four minor placings in a row. Has a low draw but prefer the place this line-up.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2.5 lengths at Ballarat over 390m (22.46) beating It's Soysages in Grade 5 on April 13. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.
